name: padosoft/laravel-patent-box-tracker
description: Laravel package that classifies R&D activity across one or more git repositories with a deterministic LLM-based classifier and emits an audit-grade PDF + JSON dossier suitable for the Italian Patent Box (110% R&D super-deduction) regime.

suggest.spatie/browsershot: Highest-fidelity PDF dossier renderer (Chromium-backed). Pair with DomPDF for environments without headless Chromium.
suggest.dompdf/dompdf: Pure-PHP PDF dossier renderer fallback for environments without headless Chromium (CI runners, air-gapped servers).
suggest.padosoft/laravel-ai-regolo: Lets the classifier run on Italian sovereign Regolo infrastructure for cost + GDPR reasons. Any laravel/ai SDK provider works.
